headline: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
summary: New Skullcandy Crusher headphones feature Bose QuietControl ANC. They also include Bose head-tracking spatial audio. The line uses dual drivers for enhanced bass.

headline: HP’s OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
summary: Best Buy offers HP OmniBook X Flip 2-in-1 for $999.99. Originally priced at $1,649.99, it's a significant saving. Features include an Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU and 16GB RAM.

headline: Apple’s reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
summary: AppleCare Plus for Macs and iPads is set to increase in price. New sign-ups will see a rise of $0.50/month or $5/year. Existing subscribers will retain their current pricing.

headline: Valve says iFixit will keep selling Steam Deck batteries after all
summary: Valve confirms iFixit will continue selling Steam Deck LCD batteries. This reverses an earlier surprising decision to discontinue them. Users can still purchase and self-install replacement batteries.

headline: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil Runtime Revealed, and It Matches Early Audience Reactions
summary: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil adaptation runtime is revealed by AMC Theaters. The film's length is comparable to the original 2002 movie. Runtime details align with early audience feedback.

headline: The Popular Budget-Friendly Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer Drops to Just $155 Shipped
summary: The Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer is now available for $155. This deal offers a budget-friendly option for quality 3D prints. It allows users to produce consistent prints without high cost.

headline: The Tiny Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC With 24GB of DDR5 RAM and USB 4 Ports Drops Below $300
summary: The Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC is on sale for under $300. It features 24GB DDR5 RAM and versatile USB 4 ports. This compact PC is suitable for various uses, including light gaming.

headline: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender Finally Gets Theatrical Release, But There's a Catch
summary: The upcoming Avatar Aang film will receive a theatrical release. Details indicate it will show in "some theaters." Specific conditions or limitations for the release are implied.

headline: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
summary: England lost to Argentina in the World Cup semi-final after leading 1-0. Questions arise if Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics were to blame. Critics describe the tactics as "passive" and causing the team to "crumble."

headline: William tells England to 'hold their heads high' after loss
summary: Prince William offered commiserations to England after their loss to Argentina. He encouraged the team to "hold their heads high." William stated the team had "inspired us all."

headline: Argentina face action after waving Falklands banner
summary: Argentina players celebrated their World Cup win with a Falklands banner. Fifa is expected to take disciplinary action against the team. The banner expressed support for Argentina's claims to the Falkland Islands.

headline: Iain Watson: Burnham faces crucial choice for chancellor as battle for No 11 continues
summary: Andy Burnham faces a critical decision regarding his chancellor appointment. The choice will signal his future intentions. The battle for the No. 11 role continues.
